metaDescription: Next Step Pro Climbing school — courses, training and online booking.

hero.tagline: Your next step in climbing starts here
hero.subtitle: Professional support on the path to your mastery starts with choosing the right coach or instructor. I'm here to help you achieve your climbing goals and grow in this exciting discipline. Together, we can create a training plan tailored to your needs and abilities, helping you reach your goals. See you at training! Thank you for your trust!
hero.subtitleMobile: Tailored training and coaching — reach your climbing goals.

step1.title: Browse the calendar
step1.description: Check available dates for trainings, courses, and workshops in our calendar.

step2.title: Choose a date
step2.description: Find a time slot that best fits your schedule and skill level.

step3.title: Sign up
step3.description: Log in and reserve your spot with a single click. It's that simple!

offer.title: Our offer
offer.subtitle: Choose a training format that suits your needs and skill level

courses.title: Courses
courses.description: Climbing courses preparing you for independent and safe climbing on rock and artificial walls. Training sessions are led by experienced PZA instructors.
courses.item1: Sport Climbing Course per PZA program

trainings.title: Training sessions
trainings.description: Regular training sessions in small groups or individually. Develop your strength, technique, and endurance under the guidance of Next Step Pro Climbing coaches.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: Specialized thematic sessions. Focus on specific aspects of climbing in an intensive format.

cta.title: Ready to take the first step?
cta.subtitle: Check available time slots and sign up for your chosen sessions. We look forward to seeing you!

athleteZone.title: Athlete zone — your training plan in one place
athleteZone.subtitle: Training regularly? Get your own training calendar run together with the coach — plan, check off sessions and stay in touch.

feat1.title: Your own calendar
feat1.description: Your trainings, bookings and invitations in week and month views.

feat2.title: Plan & execution
feat2.description: The coach builds the plan, you check off sessions with an RPE rating and feedback.

feat3.title: Chat on every session
feat3.description: Coach comments and tips attached to each training — no emails or texts.

feat4.title: Never miss a thing
feat4.description: Notifications for new trainings, comments and plan changes.

athleteZone.accessNote: Access to the Athlete zone is activated by the coach for regular trainees.
